name: Pop-up Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Pre-heat oven to 400°F.
2. Filling: In a large skillet, brown the hamburger and drain. Stir in onion, green pepper, garlic, oregano, salt, water, hot pepper sauce, and spaghetti sauce mix. Simmer about 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Batter: In a bowl, combine milk, oil, and eggs. Beat for 1 minute on medium speed. Add flour and salt. Beat until smooth.
4. Assembly: Pour the hot meat mixture into a 13x9 pan. Top with cheese slices. Pour batter over the cheese, covering the filling completely. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
5. Bake at 400°F for 25-30 minutes or until puffed and brown.
